posts.text:

posts.text:
Legally, the DOJ is clearly violating the Epstein Transparency Act. 

Not a close call:
- Production did not meet the deadline. 
- There are about 4k new Fri files - a paltry portion of the total. (Takes less than a month to redact those)
- Most other docs were already public

posts.text:
So in just the past 3 weeks:

Trump DOJ lost James Comey case

and lost Letitia James case

Trump lost bid to stop the Epstein files vote 

Trump lost every GOP senator on that vote 

Trump also lost bid to stop release of 20,000 Epstein emails

MTG resigned 

GOP lost 2025 elections
